title: Free Webinar:  3 Ways to Get More ROI with monday AI

posts.author: M_Glass (Michelle Glass)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wondering how you can make the most of monday.com?

New AI features are opening up big possibilities. But they’ll only move the needle if you can figure out how to use them effectively in your workflows.

Find out by joining our free webinar: 3 Ways to Get More ROI with monday AI

Date: Dec. 2, 2025

Time: 2-3 pm EST

Speaker: Tara Horn, Simpleday CEO

You’ll see real examples that show you how to leverage new AI tools and can ask questions about using them in practical solutions for your business.

Learn more and register here: Webinar: 3 Ways to Get More ROI with monday AI | Simpleday
